channel.title: Blog on Code & AI
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Code & AI

item.title: AI Skills: how to give your AI agent verified knowledge it does not have
item.description: Your AI agent does not know what changed in the latest version of the technologies you use. AI Skills fix that: structured, verified documentation optimized for machines. Here is how we build and use them.

item.title: AI-Augmented Development: my real experience working with an AI agent
item.description: I have been working with an AI agent as a development collaborator for months. It is not autocomplete. It is another developer on the team. This is what I have learned.
